zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Henry Ryxe於大約1386年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可伊斯頓。她於大約1406年與Henry Davye在英國英格蘭諾福爾可武普維爾聖 比特也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Henry Ryxe was born about 1386, in Easton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Henry Davye about 1406, in St Peter's Church, Upwell, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Henry Ryxeは約1386年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアストンで生まれた。約1406年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウプウエルスト ペテル'ス チャーチでHenry Davyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.St Peter's Church, Upwell, Norfolk, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 업웰 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Henry Ryxe(은)는 대략 1386년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1406년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 업웰 스트 피터'스 c후르치에서 Henry Davye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.
